name: Quality Bars Overview
summary: 8 mandatory quality bars must pass before merging to Cold: Integrity, Reachability, Nonlinearity, Gateways, Style, Determinism, Presentation, Accessibility.

criteria.name: Integrity
criteria.pass_condition: References resolve; no unintended dead ends; state effects don't create contradictions.

criteria.name: Reachability
criteria.pass_condition: Must-see beats (keystones, required items) reachable via at least one viable path.
fail_indicators: Critical content gated behind impossible conditions

criteria.name: Nonlinearity
criteria.pass_condition: Hubs/loops/gateways exist where intended and matter to play (not decorative).
fail_indicators: Claimed branches that converge without difference

criteria.name: Gateways
criteria.pass_condition: Conditions are consistent, enforceable by PN, and spoiler-safe on surface.

criteria.name: Style
criteria.pass_condition: Voice, register, motifs align with guardrails; PN remains in-voice.

criteria.name: Determinism
criteria.pass_condition: Assets reproducible from recorded parameters (seed, model, etc.) when determinism is promised.

criteria.name: Presentation
criteria.pass_condition: Player surfaces contain no spoilers or internal plumbing.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.pass_condition: Navigation clear; alt text present; sensory considerations respected.

obligations.must: Enforce all 8 quality bars before allowing merge to Cold
Block with specific bar citation and smallest viable fix
Accept Gatekeeper's quality decisions without bypass

rules.statement: No merge to Cold on quality bar failure
rules.reasoning: Exceptions are rare, explicit, and time-boxed.
